reviews.comment:
Nunca está de más citar la calidad de servicios que brinda el más que centenario Club. Área de servicios para el automotor y un confortable salón comedor en un edificio que luce muy cuidado su noble antigüedad. Además estacionamiento y parque de descanso.

(Translated by Google)
It's always worth mentioning the quality of services offered by this century-old club. It features an automotive service area and a comfortable dining room in a beautifully maintained building that showcases its distinguished history. There's also parking and a rest area.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMyZ3JDRUdnEAE

reviews.comment:
Quedé sorprendido. Fui al baño y la limpieza era excelente. Casi como que me quedo a merendar en el baño de tan limpio que estaba jajajaja jajajaja. Muy buena atención y bueno precios en el servicompras.

(Translated by Google)
I was amazed. I went to the bathroom and it was super clean. I almost felt like I was having a snack in the bathroom, it was so clean hahaha hahaha. Very good service and good prices at the grocery store.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMyX00tLXVRRRAB
